S.FORM: Norton Barnhill sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1953, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 7, Norton Barnhill, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
